header.title: Pricing that grows with you
header.subtitle: BriefFill turns rough client briefs into structured, client-ready specs. Pick the plan that fits your team — switch or cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: Diagnose what's missing. Start your first 5 briefs free.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlock AI-powered brief improvement and exports. Most popular for solo freelancers.

team.name: Team
team.description: Collaborate with your team and clients seamlessly. Perfect for growing agencies.

agency.name: Agency
agency.description: Full platform access with advanced features and API. For agencies scaling their operations.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What happens if I exceed my brief limit?
faq.a1: You'll be charged per-brief overage at the rate listed on the pricing page. You can also upgrade to the next plan from the Billing page.
faq.q2: Can I downgrade or upgrade later?
faq.a2: Yes, you can change your plan at any time from the Billing page.
faq.q3: Do you offer an annual discount?
faq.a3: Yes, annual plans are 20% off. Pro: $182/year ($15.20/month), Team: $566/year ($47.20/month), Agency: $1,430/year ($119.20/month).
faq.q4: What's included in the Free plan?
faq.a4: 5 briefs/month with AI gap detection, completeness scores, specific clarifying questions, and watermarked PDF exports.
faq.a5: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with a 14-day money-back guarantee.
faq.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a6: All major credit cards via Stripe. ACH/wire for Agency plan (contact support).

cta.title: Try BriefFill free
cta.subtitle: 5 briefs per month, no credit card required. Upgrade only when you need more.
